title: Mama's Affair
writer: Rachel Barton Butler, John Emerson, Anita Loos
actors: Constance Talmadge, Effie Shannon, Kenneth Harlan
plot: Following a burlesque prologue showing Eve in the Garden of Eden eating the forbidden fruit, Mrs. Orrin, a wealthy, selfish, impulsive widow, contrives to keep her self-sacrificing daughter in her service by marrying her off to He...
